text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While you can downplay opinions as simply
subjective, it's difficult to ignore the many forms
in which they're expressed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Support, praise, envy, criticism... Some comments
may be pleasant, but others can be hurtful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While waiting for Kawakami Princess to show up
at my office, I hurriedly check through her new
fan letters before she arrives.
choice_data_list: ...I'll hide these opinions in this box.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess ran in the Queen Elizabeth II
Cup just a few days ago, so I made today's
training a little lighter than usual.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...
choice_data_list: It looks like you're still a bit fatigued.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
N-no, not at all! I'm ready for you to bring on the
heat!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, her body is stiff and
constricted. She's not running with the same ease
she's shown before.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
There you are, Trainer! And Kawakami Princess,
long time no see!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You're...

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess, I already talked to your
trainer about this, but I'd like you to do a live
appearance on my program.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Is that so?
choice_data_list: As long as you want to, of course.
As long as you want to, of course.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
Now that the Tiara tour is over, I'm hoping you'd
be willing to deliver a message to our viewers in
your own words! Please consider it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: In my own words...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'll do it! Thank you for the opportunity!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Kawakami Princess and I arrive at the
venue for the live broadcast.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Trainer! Could you come over here for a
second?

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
As I mentioned the other day, we've prepared a
surprise cake to celebrate Kawakami Princess's
efforts in the Tiara tour.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
We'll start off by giving her the gift, and then she
can talk about her future ambitions, okay?
choice_data_list: I'm sure she'll be thrilled.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
We made the cake her favorite flavor, too. I'm
glad I asked you beforehand. Haha, this is so
exciting!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, the live broadcast begins.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text: Hello, everyone! Welcome to another episode of Meet the Racers! This week, we're broadcasting live! ♪

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Our guest today is an Umamusume who's been on
quite a roll recently! It's Kawakami Princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...It's a pleasure to be here.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
What's that? Are we a bit nervous? Hehe... well,
we've got just the antidote for that!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
In today's program, we've arranged a surprise
present for you, Kawakami Princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: A surprise present?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
This must be it... The surprise present Trainer was
hiding from me before.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, isn't the cake just lovely?! It's topped with
all of your favorite fruits, too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: —sorry. I'm... I'm sorry!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm not elegant, and I'm not princess-like... I lack
the dignity required for a race like the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
So please... please forgive me for all my
disrespectful behavior!

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text: Um... Kawakami Princess?
choice_data_list: Sorry—could we stop for a moment?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess's shoulders tremble as tears
well in her eyes. I take her to the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for making such a scene...
choice_data_list: ...What's wrong?
...What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I saw them—all those letters.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"You crushed my favorite racer's chances in the
Japanese Oaks. Her one and only big chance."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"I can't believe that at the Shuka Sho—the grand
finale of the Tiara tour—all you could talk about
was yourself. Not a single word of praise for your
opponents."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"Everything you say, everything you do, it's
always about yourself. You're the worst princess
there is."

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"You aren't fit to enter a dignified and historic
race like the Queen Elizabeth II Cup. You never
were."
choice_data_list: ...None of that is true.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: You can be honest with me. I mean, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Chestnut-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hey, this is a press conference for racers entering
the Japanese Oaks. Don't you think you should
behave more appropriately?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
After all, a princess blows past all the foes who
stand in her way!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I intend to win the Queen Elizabeth II Cup, like a
true princess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess is full of spunk and bravery, but
blessed with the dignity and grace to show mercy
to her enemies. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess is strong and shows sincere respect for
her opponents. I thought I'd learned that from
Princess Fighter, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I tried to paint myself as the only star. I treated
the other racers not as rivals, but as foes that
needed to be defeated.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I was arrogant and looked down on the other
Umamusume. I was incredibly self-centered!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I hurt the feelings of others without even realizing
it... Everything is all my fault!
choice_data_list: You did nothing wrong.
You did nothing wrong.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: That's not true. It can't be true. Because I... I...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm not a princess at all! That's why no one thinks I
am! I'm just... I'm just an embarrassment!
choice_data_list: Don't say that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her big eyes well up with tears. It looks like she
could break down at any moment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She keeps putting all of the blame on herself, but
is she really the only one who should shoulder
that burden?
choice_data_list:
You're wrong. It's my responsibility for not
giving you proper guidance.

You're wrong. It's my responsibility for not
giving you proper guidance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm her trainer. And that means it's my role to lead
her in the right direction.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...I'll hide these opinions in this box.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should never have hidden those opinions from
her. I should have explained them honestly, and
taught her what lessons she could take from them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My job is to lead her along the path to becoming
a wonderful Umamusume who feels no shame
when she looks back on her past.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: But I'm the one who actually did all those things...
choice_data_list:
Even if that's true, you're not the only one to
blame.

Even if that's true, you're not the only one to
blame.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: B-but...
choice_data_list: I'm sorry for making you shoulder all that alone.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Trainer... It's not your... It's my...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: My...
choice_data_list: ...Let's keep growing together.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! I'm sorryyyy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess loudly bawls her eyes out.
Once the tears have ceased, we make a pledge to
keep improving together.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
Are you sure you're okay? The live broadcast isn't
over yet, but...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'm truly sorry for before. I'd like to say some final
words, if that would be okay.
choice_data_list: Allow me to join her too, please.
Allow me to join her too, please.

text_block_list.name: TV Producer
text_block_list.text:
All right. Just don't push yourself if you don't feel
up to it.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...Of course.

text_block_list.name: MC
text_block_list.text:
To bring this episode to a close, Kawakami
Princess has some final words she'd like to share
with all the viewers out there.
choice_data_list: We're very sorry for what happened back there.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for suddenly losing my composure and
giving everyone such a shock. I must have made
the staff worry terribly.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But I swear that from this moment forth, I will
conduct myself properly as a princess.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: ...So I'd like you all to continue watching me.
choice_data_list: Thank you for your support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Facing the program's viewers head-on, Kawakami
Princess expresses her newfound determination
with utmost sincerity.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, I learn that this episode received around
seventy viewer complaints. I contact the TV
producer to apologize, but he tells me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Don't worry about a thing. I'm still a fan of
Kawakami Princess, and so is everyone else here."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our next goal is the Kinko Sho. I'll do my best to
support her so she can enter the race as a proud
princess.
